projects.title: RGC v2.0: Radha Gobinda Chandra Radio Galaxy Classifier
projects.description: Open-source Python package for automated morphological classification of radio AGN (FRI, FRII, WAT, NAT, Compact, Hybrid) using 20,000+ images from LOFAR/LoTSS and VLA/FIRST surveys with semi-supervised CNN and Vision LLM components.

projects.title: PIE-ADA: Photometric Transient Classification
projects.description: Physics-Informed Ensemble with Adaptive Data Augmentation for 14-class astronomical transient classification targeting LSST. Achieved 80.36% accuracy with 24–33% improvement over baselines. Full pipeline in <37 min.

projects.title: LunaXNet: Lunar Mineralogy Mapping
projects.description: Hybrid CNN-Transformer framework for semantic segmentation and quantitative analysis of lunar minerals (olivine, pyroxene, plagioclase, ilmenite) from Chandrayaan-1 M3 hyperspectral data (85 bands, 430–3000 nm).

projects.title: Vision-LLM for Multi-Wavelength Galaxy Characterization
projects.description: Multimodal AI system using CLIP/BLIP Vision-Language Models for automated galaxy characterization across optical (Pan-STARRS, SDSS), infrared (WISE), radio (LOFAR, VLA), and X-ray bands.

projects.title: GAN-Enhanced Gastrointestinal Disease Classification
projects.description: StyleGAN2-ADA based data augmentation with EfficientNetV2 + ResNet152 + ViT ensemble for 8-class gastrointestinal disease classification. Achieved 96.2% accuracy with Grad-CAM interpretability on Kvasir datasets.

projects.title: Physics-Inspired Multimodal Emotion Recognition
projects.description: Multimodal emotion recognition for telemedicine triage using MELD dataset. Features Telehealth Acoustic Augmentation Bank (TAAB) and physics-aware loss function. Fuses BERT text embeddings with physics-aware CNN audio features.

projects.title: Car Counter: Real-Time Vehicle Monitoring
projects.description: IoT system for real-time vehicle detection and counting using Raspberry Pi 4, Pi Camera, MOG2 background subtraction, centroid tracking, and Flask web dashboard. 90%+ counting accuracy.

projects.title: knackbook: Social Media Platform
projects.description: Full-stack social networking platform for creative talent sharing. Features user authentication, photo/video uploads, real-time messaging, newsfeed algorithm, and search with hashtag support.

projects.title: Goal Sensing Machine: Automated Football Goal Detection
projects.description: Arduino Uno-based system with IR beam-break sensors for automated football goal detection. 95%+ detection accuracy with LCD score display and audio-visual feedback.
